message:
feat(runtime): add CLIENT GETREDIR, TRACKINGINFO, UNBLOCK, HELP subcommands

- CLIENT GETREDIR returns -1 (not tracking) for client-side caching
- CLIENT TRACKINGINFO returns tracking status (off, redirect -1, no prefixes)
- CLIENT UNBLOCK returns 0 (no clients unblocked in single-runtime mode)
- CLIENT HELP returns comprehensive help text for all CLIENT subcommands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
